title: callirhoe involucrata f. novomexicana
intro: Callirhoe involucrata f. novomexicana, also known as the Mexican poppy mallow, is a flowering plant species belonging to the mallow family (Malvaceae). The plant has been utilized for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. The health benefits of Callirhoe involucrata f. novomexicana include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce stress, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
